channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kraaifontein teen arrested after learners riot over foreign nationals at schools
item.description: A significant disturbance took place in Kraaifontein this week when around 700 learners from Masibambane High School and Hector Peterson High School took to the streets demanding that foreign national...

item.title: Chot Reyes says TNT will enter matchup against Ginebra as underdogs in PBA Season 50
item.description: TNT is heading into their upcoming PBA Season 50 clash against Barangay Ginebra San Miguel with head coach Chot Reyes acknowledging that his squad will be considered underdogs. In comments published b...

item.title: New poll suggests One Nation leading nationally, but reliability questioned

item.title: Western Canada Faces Mixed Weather Impacts Including Heat, Smoke, Heavy Rain and Flood Risks
item.description: Western Canada is experiencing highly variable and extreme weather conditions, with multiple regions facing different hazards at the same time. According to Environment Canada, parts of eastern Britis...

item.title: Soccer Aid 2026: World XI stage late fightback as England lead charity match 3-2
item.description: The Soccer Aid 2026 charity match at Old Trafford delivered an entertaining contest as England and the World XI faced off in a high-scoring encounter featuring former professionals and celebrities. En...

item.title: Platner campaign faces renewed scrutiny over alleged post-marriage misconduct as Maine Senate race tightens
item.description: The campaign of Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner is facing renewed political pressure after new revelations about alleged personal misconduct. According to reporting, Platner’s wife, A...

item.title: Susan Lever’s Biography Sheds New Light on A.D. Hope’s Life and Poetry
item.description: Susan Lever’s biography, 'A.D. Hope: A Life', invites readers to reconsider the contributions of one of Australia’s most notable poets, Alec Derwent (A.D.) Hope (1907–2000). Initially perceived as con...

item.title: Presidential delegation visits Oyo abduction victims’ families as FG deploys 1,000 forest guards for rescue efforts

item.description: The ninth season of the animated sci-fi comedy series Rick and Morty has officially premiered, continuing the long-running show created by Justin Roiland and Dan Harmon. The series, which first launch...

item.title: Fatal Bus and Lorry Collision in Mbeya Leaves Three Dead, Four Injured
item.description: For Mbeya region, another sad traffic accident happen where a passenger bus and lorry collided, causing three people to die and four others to get injured. The accident happen under circumstances stil...

item.title: Cubao Diocese holds grand procession to honor Virgin Mary
item.description: The Diocese of Cubao recently held a grand procession to honor the Virgin Mary, drawing the participation of parishioners, devotees, and local community members. The event featured a solemn parade wit...

item.title: School communities criticise Senate following coup attempt and shooting incident
item.description: School communities from several major Philippine educational institutions expressed strong criticism toward the Senate in the aftermath of a reported coup attempt and shooting incident. According to t...

item.title: Liverpool to Begin Formal Negotiations with Andoni Iraola for Head Coach Role
item.description: Liverpool don finally move to start proper talks with Andoni Iraola as dem dey find new head coach after dem sack Arne Slot. Dem release Slot last Saturday, just one year after e lead Liverpool to win...

item.title: Israeli Military Advances in Southern Lebanon Amid Tensions with Hezbollah and Iran
item.description: Israeli forces have launched their deepest incursion into southern Lebanon in over 25 years, despite a U.S.-brokered ceasefire and ongoing diplomatic talks with Lebanon. The operation targets the Iran...

item.title: Islamabad announces revised business hours to save energy amid fuel shortages
item.description: In Islamabad, the Capital Territory Administration has implemented new energy-saving measures due to rising fuel prices and supply issues caused by the US-Iran conflict. Starting 1 June 2026, all majo...

item.title: Adebayo and Morka Clash Over Tinubu Government’s Economic Performance

item.description: The article discusses concerns raised by the Freedom of the Press Foundation regarding a reported plan by the Trump administration to implement a broad, government-wide nondisclosure agreement (NDA) f...

item.title: Bezzecchi wins Italian GP at Mugello as Aprilia disrupt Ducati centenary celebrations
item.description: Marco Bezzecchi delivered a standout performance at the Italian Grand Prix at Mugello, taking victory and spoiling Ducati’s centenary celebrations on home soil. Riding for Aprilia, Bezzecchi claimed h...

item.title: Federal judge reopens inquiry into Trump's DOJ fund settlement amid potential misconduct concerns
item.description: A federal judge in Florida, Kathleen Williams, has reopened a lawsuit regarding President Donald Trump's nearly $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund, raising significant legal questions. The inquiry...
